name: Sprint 6

dates.duration_note: Opened 2026-06-10 by Team Lead directive. EXEC-065 (update false-positive-drift fix) pulled grill-skipping as a bug fix; the rest of sprint-6 scope (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks) awaits the upcoming Work Grill before issues are filed and pulled.

goal: Ship the update false-positive-drift fix (EXEC-065) and the sprint-6 scope set by the upcoming Work Grill (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks).

shipped.title: EXEC-065: Scaffolder update stops false-positive drift when a file matches the incoming template
shipped.summary: update() now tests currentHash === templateHash before the recorded-hash drift check, so a file byte-identical to the incoming template is classified unchanged and re-anchored to the template hash regardless of a stale recorded hash. Genuine drift still reported and left in place with its old anchor; clean-upgrade refresh path unchanged. Verified in a temp-dir test (all 6 checks) and a dogfood-root update re-run reporting drifted 0 (~8 prior false-positives now unchanged).
shipped.notes: Commit 93f1489 (src/bin/cli.js only). Gates: code-standards PASS + package-qa PASS (step_log). Grill-skipping local bug fix pulled by Team Lead directive 2026-06-10. Dogfood-root marker re-anchor (8 stale anchors + 0.3.0->0.4.0) demonstrated but not committed — a live update also pulled in viewer's uncommitted src/template/viewer WIP, so builder reverted that side-effect; the code fix alone already makes those files report unchanged, so nothing is functionally pending.

shipped.title: EXEC-066: Template ships .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/; stamp policy classes both work-tracking
shipped.summary: The Template ships the two ADR-0008 record homes on every fresh init via empty .gitkeep (adr/-style): .excn/progress/ (agent/gate-written) and .excn/runtime/ (hook-written). stamp-policy adds both prefixes to WORK_TRACKING_DIR_PREFIXES, so update classes them work-tracking and never touches records inside; the .gitkeep stamps without entering the version marker. .excn/.gitignore (*_progress.json) covers both homes at any depth — no gitignore edit. Verified end-to-end in a temp dir (11 checks).
shipped.notes: Commit 7e4a7d8 (5 files: src/bin/stamp-policy.js + src/template/.excn/{progress,runtime}/.gitkeep + dogfood-root mirror). Gates: code-standards PASS + package-qa PASS (step_log). PRD-009 slice 1 (dependency root). depends_on: none.

shipped.title: EXEC-071: viewer sprint switcher — past sprints readable from the status page
shipped.summary: Viewer keeps every probed sprint and adds a header switcher (newest first, active default); a closed sprint renders the same lanes plus its decisions, retrospective notes, and step_log verdicts. Selection round-trips through the History API (pushState/popstate, ?sprint=N deep-link). No server change; read-only over the .excn JSON. Src-First + dogfood mirror; verified on the live viewer server.
shipped.notes: Commit bc8e892 (8 viewer files). Gate: code-standards PASS (step_log). PRD-009 slice 6; shipped ahead of S6-3..S6-6 (no deps). depends_on: none.

shipped.title: EXEC-068: Verdict Ledger schema — gates' append shape validates strictly
shipped.summary: New verdict-ledger.schema.json: a top-level append-only array of {step, at, artifact, summary}, entry shape defined once under #/$defs/entry. sprint.schema.json step_log items now reference it via cross-file $ref (verdict-ledger.schema.json#/$defs/entry) instead of an inlined duplicate; progress.schema.json untouched. ajv-validated: the live session ledger (.excn/session_progress.json) and sprint_6.json (cross-ref resolved) both validate. Src-First + dogfood mirror.
shipped.notes: Commit f9f2af6 (4 files: verdict-ledger.schema.json new + sprint.schema.json + dogfood-root mirror of both). Gate: package-qa PASS, manifest 49 files (step_log). code-standards not run — EXEC-068's acceptance omits the code gates and the JS-focused rubric has nothing to evaluate in a JSON schema (flagged to Team Lead). PRD-009 slice 3. depends_on: none.

shipped.title: EXEC-070: progress-location deny guard — misfiled Progress Record writes denied with a redirect
shipped.summary: PreToolUse deny guard in the spawn-guard pattern (ADR-0008): when enabled, a *_progress.json write outside the two homes (.excn/progress/, .excn/runtime/) is denied with a redirect reason naming both homes + the writer-class rule; every other write passes. Default OFF, fail-safe on any error/malformed config/payload, one invocation record per firing. Toggle optional in hooks-config.schema.json (older configs stay valid, spawn_guard precedent). Location only — schema and content stay the gates' job. Src-First + dogfood mirror.
shipped.notes: Commit e7f4cd5 (10 files: progress-location-guard{,-rules}.js + settings.json + hooks.config.json toggle + hooks-config.schema.json, all dogfood-mirrored). Gates: code-standards PASS + package-qa PASS, manifest 51 files (step_log); 15-check payload simulation (deny/pass/fail-safe). Scope note: the guard's doctor card (HOOK_FEATURES in src/bin/health-policy.js) ships with EXEC-067 to avoid splitting that shared file across two blocked commits — not an EXEC-070 acceptance criterion. PRD-009 slice 5. depends_on: EXEC-066.

shipped.title: EXEC-067: hooks, doctor, viewer-server read and write Runtime Records under .excn/runtime/
shipped.summary: The four hook-written Runtime Records (invocation heartbeat ledger, viewer-server pid record, gate-watch state, load-report) move out of the .excn base into .excn/runtime/ (ADR-0008). doctor reads heartbeats + viewer-server state from the new home and lists all 6 features; the daemon PATH_WHITELIST serves .excn/runtime/*.json. Suffix + gitignore unchanged. gate-watch's verdict-evidence scan still reads the .excn base + sprints/ — those Progress Records relocate in EXEC-069, where the scan follows. Src-First + dogfood mirror; e2e temp-dir test green.
shipped.notes: Commit 2badcaa (10 files: hook-lib, load-report, gate-watch, viewer-server-rules + dogfood mirrors + cli.js doctor help + health-policy.js read-side). Gates: code-standards PASS (prior FAIL cleared by the CODE_STANDARDS ## Hooks rubric sweep 5f8111f) + package-qa PASS, manifest 51 files (step_log). The deferred EXEC-070 doctor card (progress_location_guard HOOK_FEATURES) landed here in health-policy.js, completing that deferral. PRD-009 slice 2. depends_on: EXEC-066.

shipped.title: EXEC-069: migrate command relocates Progress/Runtime Records; doctor flags the legacy flat layout
shipped.summary: A to-execution migrate command relocates legacy flat-layout *_progress.json records into their ADR-0008 homes by writer class (RUNTIME_RECORD_BASENAMES -> .excn/runtime/, all others -> .excn/progress/). Location-only (fs.rename, byte-identical), idempotent (scans base top-level only; re-run no-op; destination clash skipped not clobbered), every move reported. doctor flags the legacy flat layout and names migrate, reports clean after. update untouched. gate-watch's verdict-evidence scan now follows verdict ledgers into .excn/progress/. Src-First + dogfood mirror.
shipped.notes: Commit 813217e (4 files: migrate-policy.js new + cli.js migrate verb/doctor/dispatch + gate-watch.js + root mirror). Gates: code-standards PASS + package-qa PASS, which exercised the full migrate contract (24-check + 5-check fixtures). Two acceptance pieces deliberately deferred per the root-restamp ruling, both since RESOLVED: (1) the live dogfood-root migration + marker re-anchor landed (commit a27883f: 11 records relocated to .excn/progress/, doctor reports the ADR-0008 homes, marker at 0.4.0, progress_location_guard ON); (2) the durable package-qa Migrate-contract rubric extension landed (commit 0a96a99, alignment PASS). PRD-009 slice 4. depends_on: EXEC-066, EXEC-067.

shipped.title: EXEC-072: viewer hook health — doctor-parity cards plus the invocation log
shipped.summary: Viewer gains a hook-health panel over the Runtime Record invocation ledger (.excn/runtime/hook-invocations_progress.json): per-feature doctor-parity cards (firing/stale/disabled + last heartbeat) plus a collapsible recent-invocations table filterable by feature and outcome, capped newest-first with the remainder summarized; absent/empty ledger renders an explicit empty state. Status is ledger-derived (HOOK_FEATURES/HEARTBEAT_FRESH_MS mirror health-policy.js). Read-only; Src-First + dogfood mirror; verified on the live viewer server.
shipped.notes: Commit 3bf5bbe (8 viewer files). Gate: code-standards PASS (step_log). Bundled the EXEC-067 viewer-side load-path follow-up (LOAD_PROGRESS_PATH -> .excn/runtime/load_progress.json) into the same commit — both are the viewer's ADR-0008 runtime-home reads. PRD-009 slice 7. depends_on: EXEC-067.

shipped.title: EXEC-073: Setup Skill drops the unused async-questions Preflight gate; stale work-tracking prose swept
shipped.summary: The Setup Skill's Preflight hard-gated on the async-questions global skill, which nothing in the product invokes — it would block every external adopter on an unused dependency. Removed; make-teammate is now the only global-skill gate. Same sweep: the supporting-info work-tracking prose, still describing the pre-ADR-0005 all-gitignored flat layout, is brought to current truth (ADR-0005 *_progress.json-only ignore + ADR-0008 .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/ homes). grep confirms async-questions absent from src/.
shipped.notes: Commit f8551d8; ships in npm 0.5.0. Acceptance verified (grep clean, prose current). Late grill-skipping fix pulled by Team Lead directive 2026-06-10; surfaced while scoping plugin-marketplace publication (the Preflight dependency story was the real publish blocker).

shipped.title: EXEC-079: spawn guard allows persistent team spawns (name + team_name)
shipped.summary: Spawn guard distinguishes persistent team spawns (name + team_name present) from transient one-shot copies of rostered Teammates; allows the former, keeps denying the latter with a redirect naming the mechanism.
shipped.notes: Commit e5bcf81 (4 files: template spawn-guard{,-rules}.cjs + dogfood .js mirrors). Gates: code-standards PASS + package-qa PASS (step_log). Ships in npm 0.5.2.

in_progress.title: EXEC-080: view-status command — start viewer server if needed, open browser
in_progress.summary: CLI verb that reuses or starts the viewer-server daemon from its Runtime Record and opens the default browser to the status page URL.

in_progress.title: EXEC-081: validate verb + ajv as a shipped dependency
in_progress.summary: to-execution validate auto-detects the .excn schema for a work-tracking file and validates with ajv, now a real package dependency, replacing agents' ad-hoc ajv installs.

retrospective_notes.title: Sprint-6 scope is grill-pending; EXEC-065 pulled ahead of it
retrospective_notes.body: The Work Grill for the rest of sprint-6 scope (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks) has not run yet. EXEC-065 is a grill-skipping bug fix pulled into sprint 6 by Team Lead directive on 2026-06-10; the remaining scope is filed and pulled only after the grill runs.

retrospective_notes.title: npm 0.3.0 lagged HEAD at the same version number (PRD-009 grill)
retrospective_notes.body: The published npm 0.3.0 lagged HEAD while carrying the same version number — template content changed without a version bump, so consumers on 0.3.0 silently missed it. Candidate: a preflight guard forcing a version bump when template content changes. Philosophy/process candidate carried for the Retro Loop.

retrospective_notes.title: Mid-sprint root-restamp clobber (EXEC-065 x EXEC-071)
retrospective_notes.body: Builder's dogfood `update` mirrored viewer's uncommitted template WIP into the root; builder's lane-isolation revert then wiped viewer's hand-mirror. Team Lead ruling for the rest of sprint 6: no update/migrate against the live dogfood root while lanes have WIP (temp-dir verification only; Team Lead sequences dogfood runs at clean-tree points), and never revert paths outside your own lane. Candidate durable rule for the Retro Loop (PROCESS.md or TEAM_DIRECTIVE Don'ts).
